cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. First, I need to look at all the information given about where she was at different times. Let me list out each person's sighting and the times: - Jennifer woke up at 5am. So she's definitely up then, but there's no mention of her going anywhere else at 5am. - Richard saw her working at the office from 5am to 8am. That means from 5am until 8am, she was at the office. So she wasn't available for the pool during that time. - Then there's a gap between 8am and 12pm. Wait, the next sighting is Samantha seeing her reading at the library from 12pm to 1pm. So between 8am and 12pm,
